recommendations.title: That Thing You Do!
recommendations.overview: A Pennsylvania band scores a hit in 1964 and rides the star-making machinery as long as it can, with lots of help from its manager. But behind the scenes, the group’s sudden fame tests their strength, their maturity and responsibility, and their abil

recommendations.title: Love on the Sidelines
recommendations.overview: A down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback sidelined with an injury. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

recommendations.title: Larry Crowne
recommendations.overview: When he suddenly finds himself without his long-standing blue-collar job, Larry Crowne enrolls at his local college to start over. There, he becomes part of an eclectic community of students and develops a crush on his teacher.

recommendations.title: Clara
recommendations.overview: An astronomer becomes obsessed with searching the cosmos for signs of life beyond Earth which leads to a shocking discovery.

recommendations.title: Presto
recommendations.overview: Dignity. Poise. Mystery. We expect nothing less from the great turn-of-the-century magician, Presto. But when Presto neglects to feed his rabbit one too many times, the magician finds he isn't the only one with a few tricks up his sleeve!

recommendations.title: Men Are from Mars... And That's Where I'm Going!
recommendations.overview: Successful at work, Fernanda is an example of women of the third millennium, free to make their choices and independent. Yet in her personal life she finds herself struggling to find a husband. Like other women of her generation, Fernanda put her per

recommendations.title: The Perfect Find
recommendations.overview: After a high-profile firing, everything is at stake for 40-year-old Jenna: her career, her ticking biological clock, and her bank account. Her fashion career comeback hits a snag when she falls for a charming, much younger coworker — who happens to b

recommendations.title: R.L. Stine's Monsterville: The Cabinet of Souls
recommendations.overview: Teenage friends must resist the spell of an evil showman staging a house of horrors show in their small town.

recommendations.title: Victor/Victoria
recommendations.overview: A struggling female soprano finds work playing a male female impersonator, but it complicates her personal life.

recommendations.title: We Are the Nobles
recommendations.overview: Tells the "riches to rags" story of the Nobles, three upper-class twenty-somethings that appear to have no limits to their checkbooks, and no direction in their lives. Until one day, their father tries to teach them a lesson by staging a financial sc
